name: rocky-marketplace
description: Marketplace serving the rocky Claude Code plugin from GitHub (minjun0219/rocky). Plugin source is an explicit git URL (no relative paths) so it also syncs in the claude.ai web UI's server-side marketplace sync. For the in-place local dev loop use ./marketplace.dev.json (rocky-dev) instead.

plugins.name: rocky
plugins.description: 7 openapi_* tools (cache-first OpenAPI / Swagger spec inspection, endpoint search, tag list) + seo_validate + notion_* (ntn CLI-gated) + worklog_* (append-only local JSONL worklog, auto turn capture via Stop hook). Slash commands: /finish, /recall, /codex, /opencode, /issue, /soul.
